topic: Ilhan Omar net worth Google Trends
summary: Google Trends data shows rapid post-spike decline; active news cycle creates spike risk
content: Daily data shows massive spike Jan 26-28 (peak 100), now rapidly declining to 8 on Feb 4. Baseline is 0-5. Post-spike decay pattern suggests reaching baseline by Feb 10-14. However, active news cycle (DOJ investigation, Trump rhetoric about Omar's finances, town hall attack prosecution) creates ~30% probability of new spike in Feb 5-14 window. Two distinct spike events in last 5 weeks suggests elevated frequency. Weekly data shows 4 spikes in 7 weeks.
